title: Czech-Taiwan Ties Are Cooling in Rhetoric, Not Reality
gist: The Diplomat argues that despite expectations that Andrej Babiš's return as Czech PM would chill Prague's warm ties with Taiwan, and despite his own criticism of the prior government's China-unfriendly stance, the substance of Czech-Taiwan relations has mostly held even as public rhetoric has cooled.

insights.claim: When Andrej Babiš returned as Czech prime minister in late 2025, many observers assumed Czechia's unusually warm relationship with Taiwan, built under the previous government, would cool.
insights.speaker: František Kadlec
insights.so_what: Establishes the consensus expectation the article goes on to challenge, a baseline for tracking European-Taiwan diplomatic ties amid China-friendly government changes.
insights.quote: many assumed Czechia’s unusually warm relationship with Taiwan would cool with him
insights.locator: When Prime Minister Andrej Babiš returned

insights.claim: Babiš had criticized the previous Czech government's pro-Taiwan posture as 'ideological indulgence' that harmed Czech business interests in China.
insights.speaker: František Kadlec
insights.so_what: Reveals the explicit economic rationale, protecting China-linked business ties, behind Babiš's realignment rhetoric, a signal of how China-dependent business interests can shift a government's public posture on Taiwan.
insights.quote: ideological indulgence that harmed Czech business interests in China

insights.claim: A closer look at what has actually changed rather than what has been said shows that Babiš's government has cooled the rhetoric on Taiwan while leaving most of the substance of the relationship in place.
insights.speaker: František Kadlec
insights.so_what: A contrarian read against the prevailing narrative of Czech-Taiwan drift, implying the durability of European Taiwan-aligned partnerships against Beijing pressure may be higher than headlines suggest.
insights.quote: Babiš’s government has cooled the rhetoric while leaving most of the substance in place
insights.locator: A closer look at what has actually changed
